params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude coordinate (-90 to 90). Optional, defaults to 51.5074 (London, UK)

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude coordinate (-180 to 180). Optional, defaults to -0.1278 (London, UK - west is negative)

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Unix timestamp (optional, defaults to current time)

items.docs: Returns simplified moon phase data with phase name, stage, and days until next phases. Lat/lon are optional and default to London coordinates (51.5074, -0.1278). Backwards compatible.

info.name: Get moon and sun data calendar

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude coordinate (-90 to 90). Optional, defaults to 51.5074 (London, UK)

params.name: lon
params.description: Longitude coordinate (-180 to 180). Optional, defaults to -0.1278 (London, UK - west is negative)

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)

params.name: days
params.description: Number of days from today (if dates not provided, default: 30)

items.docs: Returns moon and sun data for a date range
